InstanceURL.title: Salesforce Instance URL
InstanceURL.description: Customer's Salesforce instance URL (e.g., https://customer.my.salesforce.com). Required by Nimble AMS because it runs on the Salesforce platform — REST API calls are made against this host.

ClientID.title: Client ID
ClientID.description: Salesforce Connected App Consumer Key (Client ID) for the Client Credentials OAuth grant.

AccessToken.title: Access Token
AccessToken.description: Optional — pre-existing access token. Connector will obtain a fresh one via client_credentials if absent or expired.

RefreshToken.title: Refresh Token
RefreshToken.description: Optional — only used if running the connector in Authorization Code mode rather than Client Credentials.
